mapper.insert:
insert into user_episode_watch (user_id, subject_id, episode_id, watch_status, watched_at) values
(#{userId}, #{subjectId}, #{episodeId}, 1, current_timestamp)
on duplicate key update subject_id = values(subject_id), watch_status = values(watch_status), watched_at = coalesce(watched_at, values(watched_at))
